query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO kc_library (kc_id, name, domain, jurisdiction, category, authority_type, authority_cite, authority_notes, tags) VALUES
('CRIM_FED_MAIL_FRAUD_1341', 'Mail Fraud', 'criminal', 'FED', 'White Collar', 'statute', '18 U.S.C. § 1341', 'Scheme + use of mails + intent.', 'fraud,white-collar'),
('CRIM_FED_WIRE_FRAUD_1343', 'Wire Fraud', 'criminal', 'FED', 'White Collar', 'statute', '18 U.S.C. § 1343', 'Scheme + interstate wire + intent.', 'fraud,white-collar,cyber'),
('CRIM_FED_CONSPIRACY_371', 'Conspiracy (general)', 'criminal', 'FED', 'Inchoate', 'statute', '18 U.S.C. § 371', 'Agreement + overt act + unlawful objective.', 'conspiracy'),
('CRIM_FED_ID_DOC_FRAUD_1028', 'Identity Document Fraud', 'criminal', 'FED', 'White Collar / Identity', 'statute', '18 U.S.C. § 1028', 'ID document/means of identification offenses.', 'identity,fraud'),
('CRIM_FED_AGG_ID_THEFT_1028A', 'Aggravated Identity Theft', 'criminal', 'FED', 'White Collar / Identity', 'statute', '18 U.S.C. § 1028A', 'Requires predicate offense + mandatory consecutive sentence structure.', 'identity,enhancement-like'),
('CRIM_FED_MONEY_LAUNDERING_1956', 'Money Laundering', 'criminal', 'FED', 'Financial Crime', 'statute', '18 U.S.C. § 1956', 'Proceeds + specified unlawful activity + intent/knowledge.', 'financial,laundering'),
('CRIM_FED_RICO_1962', 'RICO (criminal)', 'criminal', 'FED', 'RICO', 'statute', '18 U.S.C. § 1962', 'Enterprise + pattern + racketeering acts.', 'rico,enterprise'),
('CRIM_FED_DRUG_841', 'Controlled Substances Distribution / PWID (umbrella)', 'criminal', 'FED', 'Controlled Substances', 'statute', '21 U.S.C. § 841', 'Substance/quantity drive penalties.', 'drugs'),
('CRIM_FED_922G', 'Firearm Possession by Prohibited Person (common bucket)', 'criminal', 'FED', 'Firearms', 'statute', '18 U.S.C. § 922(g)', 'Prohibited status + possession + interstate nexus (typ.).', 'firearms');
